App: Dimpact e2e test

Feature:Login 5

Scenario:
Bob wants to login to ZAC
3

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 940ms

When "Bob" logs in 918ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 2s 488ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 317ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 409ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 1s 503ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 20ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 583ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 28ms

When "Bob" logs in 828ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 2s 319ms

Scenario:
Bob wants to log out of the application after being logged in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 320ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with accessibility label: "Gebruikers profiel" 413ms

When "Bob" clicks on element with text: "Uitloggen" 1s 71ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 23ms

Scenario:
Bob logs back in
4

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 541ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Sign in to your account" 31ms

When "Bob" logs in 810ms

Then "Bob" sees the text: "Dashboard" 2s 418ms

Feature:Zaak 1

Scenario:
Bob wants to create a new zaak
5

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/" 2s 521ms

When "Bob" wants to create a new zaak 14s 627ms

Then "Bob" sees the created zaak with a delay 1m 10s 1ms

Given "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" with delay after of 5000 ms 6s 889ms

Then "Bob" sees the created zaak < 1ms

Feature:Resident submits form in open-forms 1

@live-env-only
Scenario:
Resident fills in indienen-aansprakelijkheid-behandelen open-forms form
5 1

Feature:External Systems 1

Scenario:
Employee wants to create a new document for a zaak
4

Given Employee "Bob" is on the newly created zaak with status "Intake" 4s 322ms

Feature:Taken 1

Scenario:
Employee "Bob" does not have enough information to finish Intake and assigns a task to Employee "Oscar"
7

Given Employee "Bob" is on the newly created zaak with status "Intake" 4s 442ms

When Employee "Bob" does not have enough information to finish Intake and assigns a task to Employee "Oscar" 19s 828ms

And Employee "Bob" logs out of zac 1s 380ms

And Employee "Oscar" logs in to zac 1s 495ms

Then Employee "Oscar" sees the task assigned to Employee "Bob" in my task list 1s 889ms

And Employee "Oscar" is on the newly created zaak with status "Intake" 3s 889ms

And Employee "Oscar" sees the task assigned by Employee "Bob" in the newly created zaak tasks list < 1ms

Feature:Zaken verdelen / vrijgeven 2

Scenario:
Bob distributes zaken to a group
7 1

Given "Bob" is logged in to zac 3s 588ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" 1s 889ms

And the page is done searching 2s 560ms

And there are at least 3 zaken 31ms

When "Bob" selects that number of zaken 277ms

And "Bob" distributes the zaken to the first group available 799ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the distribution of zaken is starting 364ms

Screenshot

Scenario:
Bob releases zaken
7 1

Given "Bob" is logged in to zac 3s 610ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/zaken/werkvoorraad" 1s 243ms

And the page is done searching 2s 45ms

And there are at least 3 zaken 30ms

When "Bob" selects that number of zaken 287ms

And "Bob" releases the zaken 354ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the releasement of zaken is starting 345ms

And after a while the snackbar disappears 5m 119ms Show Error +

Feature:Taken verdelen / vrijgeven 2

Scenario:
Bob distributes taken to a group
6 1

Given "Bob" is logged in to zac 3s 143ms

And "Bob" navigates to "zac" with path "/taken/werkvoorraad" 1s 779ms

And the page is done searching 15s 755ms

And there are at least 3 taken 20ms

When "Bob" selects that number of taken 208ms

And "Bob" distributes the taken to the first group available 757ms

Then "Bob" gets a message confirming that the distribution of taken is complete 1m 119ms Show Error +
